rows.notes: Top-centre page title. Handwriting a little stylised; read as 'Levyy Rines' (could be 'Levy Rines' or similar). No amounts in the same line.

Small cluster of place/names at very top-left with a single small 3 | 14 | 4 aligned in the pounds/shillings/pence columns at the top-right. The description is ambiguous and several place-names/numbers are merged; amount columns are clear but the mapping of which sub-item they refer to is uncertain.

A long line of text has been heavily struck through. I transcribed as 'Recepcheck ...' to reflect visible letter shapes, but the line is mostly illegible due to the strike-through. No amounts visible on this line.

rows.description: Bursarijs & Imponijs Cell et nota Domus
rows.notes: Centered section heading. Handwriting relatively clear; no amounts on the heading line.

rows.description: P: W: Amy Bur: in all for Impensa
rows.notes: Clear transaction line. Numbers at the right read cleanly as 15 | 9 | 11; vertical ruling alignment unambiguous and values are within valid ranges.
Left-margin label adjacent to a curly bracket of names. Handwriting a little stylised but readable as 'Hule Prisoners' (could be 'Hull Prisoners' or similar). No monetary amount on the label line.
One of the four bracketed names (sub-items). No amount on this specific line; appears as a sub-item whose amount is shown on the sibling subtotal row to the right.
Second name in the bracket. No individual amount visible; read as a sub-item. Handwriting moderately clear.
Third name in the bracket. No amount on this line; letters are fairly legible.
Fourth name in bracket. No amount on the line; handwritten numerals relatively clear.

Subtotal aligned with the bracketed list; numeric columns read clearly as 4 | 10 | 0. There is no descriptive text on the same line (appears as a lone amount), so treated as a subtotal/total for the bracket.
Section sum clearly written 'Sum' with amounts 23 | 14 | 3. Matches column alignment and validates against the component amounts (15 9 11 + 4 10 0 + 3 14 4 = 23 14 3).
Centered heading for the next account section. Handwriting clear ('Dno Xri et Socijs'). No amounts on this line.

rows.description: Ad fest. nat. B Augm. Southn. et Moriton
rows.notes: Line is legible and the amount 23 | 10 | 0 is clearly aligned in the page's right-hand columns. Values within valid ranges.
Clear description and amount 18 | 0 | 0. The entry appears to be the stipend/officers line for the section.

rows.description: Ad fest. Ann. B augm. red Cudlington 3 parts
rows.notes: Description moderately clear ('Ad fest. Ann. ... Cudlington 3 parts'). Amount reads as 33 | 02 | 10; pence 10 is within valid range. Some minor uncertainty in exact orthography of place name.
A 'Stipend.' line immediately following the Cudlington line. Amount 27 | 13 | 4 is clear in the columns and consistent with ledger spacing.

rows.description: Ad fest. Bapt. Q 4 parts red. augm. Endingt.
rows.notes: Line reads 'Ad fest. Bapt. Q 4 parts red. augm. Endingt.' with amount appearing as 40 | 00 | 10. The pence column is clearly '10', but there is slight hesitation on exact abbreviation spelling of place name; amount alignment is clear.
Clear stipend line with amount 17 | 00 | 00. Handwriting of description and numerals is legible.

rows.description: Ad fest. Mich Q augm. red Longwit.
rows.notes: Reads as 'Ad fest Mich' with place 'Longwit' (approx.). Amount 30 | 19 | 11 is clearly written; pence 11 is valid. Minor uncertainty on spelling of place.
Line 'fol. G Guinear' (name/folio reference). Amount to right reads 22 | 15 | 0 with good alignment and legibility.
Section total clearly written as 183 | 2 | 0. Numeric alignment with previous lines is consistent; values are within expected ranges.
Major total line. 'Summa Omnium Solutionum' is clearly written; amounts 533 | 9 | 6 are aligned in the three money columns and easily legible.

Reads as 'Summa Omnium Receptorum' (orthography uncertain). The numeric block reads '455 | 6 | 7' though there is some small, faint stray ink to the right of the pence that slightly obscures final digit; chosen reading is 7d based on shape and spacing.
Clear 'Ita debentur Dno Computanti' with amounts 78 | 2 | 10. Alignment and numerals are legible and consistent with the ledger columns.
Signature/name line beneath totals. Handwriting clear and no amount on the line.
Second signature/name line; 'dec.' abbreviation visible. No monetary amount.
Third signature/name line; fairly clear handwriting. No amount on this line.

Bottom-right contains several inked signatures; this particular flourish reads roughly as 'Gri. Paynter' but is heavily stylised/partly overwritten; no amount. Low confidence due to cursive overlap and ink blotting.
Several further small signature-like scribbles at the very bottom-right are present; mostly illegible and overlapped. No monetary amounts associated. Recorded as a single row of illegible signatures.
